sources.name: Switching Costs
sources.rationale: high segment concentration at 68.0% (significant platform stickiness)

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: cost position not clearly distinguishable from data

sources.name: Efficient Scale
sources.rationale: Space Systems dominance at 68.0% revenue share

analysis: Switching Costs and Network Effect provide some competitive protection, but not all moat sources are fully developed. The company has defensible advantages that should persist for several years but may face erosion over time.
